name: Peregrine Diamonds Ltd.
description: Peregrine Diamonds Ltd. was a Canadian-based diamond exploration and development company primarily focused on projects in northern Canada, including the Chidliak diamond project in Nunavut. Founded in 2003 and formerly listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker PGD, the company held significant interests in diamond exploration properties across Nunavut, the Northwest Territories, and internationally in Botswana. Peregrine Diamonds was acquired by De Beers Canada in 2018, marking the end of its tenure as an independent publicly traded entity focused on identifying and advancing high-quality diamond resources.
